_meta.source: BEA Regional Price Parities, all-items, by state (curated)
_meta.notes: Index where US average = 100. Higher = more expensive. Refresh annually from BEA Table SARPP (released each December for prior year). 2023 release: December 2024. Confirmed values from BEA news release: CA 112.5, HI 110.8, WA 109.8, NJ 108.9, AR 86.5, MS 87.3, AL 87.8, SD 88.1. All other values are estimates based on BEA 2022 actuals adjusted for documented 2022→2023 trends (high-cost coastal markets eased, mountain-west and remote-work destinations rose).
